checks.name: every click inside live target rect
clicks preceded by arrival + readable hover
no app action before cursor arrival
click feedback matches real press frame
checks.detail: compositor draws ring at pressT (same event log)

checks.name: no hardcoded interaction coords where live resolution exists
checks.detail: all clicks resolve a live target

checks.name: no stale highlight after target disappears
checks.detail: menu intervals ; all menu highlights within

checks.name: caption wording follows narration order
checks.detail: Command Center→Live→Active States→Full USA→Priority Intelligence→Critical→High Priority→Revenue Plays→Automations→Action Ownership→Ask MAIA

checks.name: caption cues align with spoken phrases
captions do not obscure active target
checks.detail: all clicks clear of caption region

checks.name: no unexplained cursor reversal
checks.detail: pointer path is a single eased plan per move; reversals only at target arrivals

checks.name: no login screen
checks.detail: flow starts and ends on command-center

checks.name: no credential on screen
checks.detail: signed in off-camera via token flow; no credential UI in capture region

checks.name: no session-expiration dialog
checks.detail: idle dialog not encountered; menu watch clean

checks.name: forbidden controls never clicked
checks.detail: forbidden: logout, send, launch, target →, recover, assign, ask shyne, ask maia, maiaChip, open location dashboard, cc-row, delete, approve, submit, refund

checks.name: application not modified or visually falsified
checks.detail: engine is read-only DOM + CDP input; graphics are external

checks.name: final completion hold and visual fade present

residuals: Step 4/5 narration says "the whole interface" drops to dark; the real app does change the whole interface theme, so no wording-vs-behavior conflict was found. Framing pulls wide at the theme flip so the learner sees the genuine extent of the change.
